overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Chinese martial arts game showing a character exploring a traditional ancient town at night. The character walks through courtyards, covered markets, and open streets lined with lantern-lit shops, eventually entering a grand ornate building with red pillars and decorative umbrellas.

events.description: character turns slightly toward the wooden gate entrance

notable_agents.action: standing near the building wall observing the surroundings

traditional wooden building with lattice windows and paper screens
wooden gate structure with lit paper lanterns hanging on posts

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a traditional Chinese courtyard at dusk, passing a burning fire pit and approaching a wooden gate. A few NPCs stand around the perimeter near the wooden buildings with lattice windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market passage with food stalls

character navigates between market stalls and pedestrians

lit paper lanterns hanging from the covered structure ceiling
wooden vendor stalls displaying various goods

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the gate into a covered market passage where vendors tend to cooking stalls with steam rising. The area is lit by hanging paper lanterns, and several pedestrians walk through the narrow space between wooden stalls.

scene_state.functional_zone: open market street with shops and pedestrians

events.description: exiting covered market into open street with visible sky
character turns slightly to navigate around pedestrians on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along an open cobblestone street lined with shops and street vendors

vendor standing behind a textile stall with hanging fabrics

stall with colorful fabrics and cloth hanging on display
wooden shop with curved roof tiles and decorative signage

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered market, the character walks along an open cobblestone street lit by tall lantern poles. Various shops line the street, including a textile stall with hanging fabrics, while pedestrians in traditional dress walk alongside.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand plaza approaching ornate building with tall lantern tower

events.description: approaching the large ornate building with red pillars and green trim
character slows and looks up at the building facade and decorations
approaching the entrance steps of the grand building

agents.ego_description: walking toward an impressive multi-story building, observing the architecture and lantern decorations

notable_agents.action: person standing near a parked horse-drawn carriage

entered.detail: large ornate building with red pillars, green trim, and curved roofs
multi-tiered pole with numerous hanging spherical lanterns
large red and white circular umbrellas attached to building facade
ornate wooden carriage with white horse parked on the street

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a grand building with elaborate red pillars and green decorative trim. A tall multi-tiered lantern tower stands near the entrance, and large decorative umbrellas adorn the facade. Horse-drawn carriages are parked along the wide cobblestone plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand interior hall with red pillars and reception desk

events.description: entering the building through large red doors into the interior hall
exiting the rear of the building onto a balcony with mountain view

agents.ego_description: entering a grand hall with red pillars, walking across an ornate carpet toward a reception counter, then exiting to a rear balcony

notable_agents.action: receptionist standing behind the wooden counter inside the hall

entered.detail: tall red painted pillars with green trim marking the entrance
long wooden counter with decorative items and a map on the wall behind
ornate red carpet with gold patterns covering the floor
wooden staircase with white railings leading to upper floor
outdoor patio area with wooden railing and mountain view

segments.scene_description: The character enters the grand building through red pillars into a spacious interior hall with a red carpet and wooden reception counter. After briefly exploring the hall and passing a staircase, the character exits through the rear onto a balcony overlooking a mountainous landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet residential courtyard at dusk into the bustling heart of an ancient town, ending with a panoramic view of a distant mountain range. It begins by following the character past a burning fire pit and lattice-windowed buildings toward a wooden gate, which opens into a narrow, covered market filled with rising steam and glowing paper lanterns. As the character emerges from the market, the scene expands into an open cobblestone street lined with textile stalls and tall lantern poles before turning toward a grand building adorned with red pillars and decorative umbrellas. The camera then glides through the building's ornate interior hall and across a red carpet, finally passing a staircase to exit onto a rear balcony overlooking a vast mountainous landscape.
